title: Happy Ghast Specimen
description: A Harnessed happy ghast sit on a tissue paper box. This specimen exhibits unique cute cubic structures. Scanned by RealityComposer, this model captures the intricate details of the features and textures. Perfect for display or educational purposes.

hotspots.label: Happy Ghast Face
hotspots.description: The specimen's closed eyes and gentle smile give it a friendly expression, distinct from the aggressive look of a traditional Ghast.
hotspots.prompt: Tell me about this closed-eye smiling face. How does it differ from a normal Ghast?

hotspots.label: Tissue Box Base
hotspots.description: The Happy Ghast is posed on a tissue box, creating a deliberately playful scale contrast between the soft cube form and an everyday object.
hotspots.prompt: What is this tissue box base it is sitting on? Is it a standard Kleenex box?

hotspots.label: Ghast Harness
hotspots.description: A harness wraps over the top of the Ghast, adding a functional-looking detail that suggests how this friendly creature could be guided or ridden.
hotspots.prompt: Can you explain the harness on this Ghast?

reference.title: Reference Views
reference.description: Orthographic views derived from the scanned specimen.

creative.title: Creative Context
creative.description: Staged real-world photographs of the Happy Ghast plush.

images.description: The front orthographic view of the 3D specimen.
visualFacts: The smiling face is visible from the front.
The plush sits above the front panel of the tissue box.
images.aiPrompt: Explain the specimen's front-facing features and what makes the Happy Ghast look friendly.
